channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Former Labour MP calls for Starmer to face Commons committee over Mandelson vetting
item.description: Karl Turner, who lost Labour whip after criticising PM and No 10, calls for privileges committee to examine if Starmer misled parliament UK politics l...

item.title: UK undershoots annual borrowing target by £700m
item.description: Figure hits three-year low but Iran war expected to blow hole in Reeves’s fiscal ‘headroom’ Business live – latest updates The UK government budget ca...

item.title: Police and ombudsman investigate death of boy, 16, at young offender institution
item.description: Teenager found unresponsive at Feltham YOI, the first such death in England or Wales since 2019 Police and the prisons ombudsman are investigating the...

item.title: Trump to host bash for crypto investors tied to his coin sales
item.description: Top buyers promised access at Mar-a-Lago event as Democrats and watchdogs warn of pay-to-play risks Donald Trump is slated to star at a cryptocurrency...

item.title: EU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine and fresh Russia sanctions – Europe live
item.description: Move comes after Hungary and Slovakia dropped opposition following reopening of the Druzhba oil pipeline Meanwhile, Ukraine’s president Volodymyr Zele...

item.title: Sara Cox replaces Scott Mills on Radio 2 breakfast show
item.description: The 51-year-old, who is originally from Bolton, currently presents the teatime show on Radio 2.

item.title: Trump administration reclassifies cannabis as less dangerous
item.description: Medical marijuana was moved into a lower category of drugs in order to increase research and access.

item.title: Lamine Yamal season over but Spain star should make World Cup
item.description: Lamine Yamal will miss the rest of Barcelona's season with a hamstring injury but he is expected to return for Spain at the World Cup.

item.title: Two men guilty of 'callous' Brighton beach rape
item.description: The men had denied targeting the woman in the early hours of 4 October.

item.title: Israeli strikes kill eight Palestinians in Gaza, first responders say
item.description: One strike killed three children and two adults near a mosque in the northern town of Beit Lahia on Wednesday evening.
